sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27904" key="dolixai/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δολῐχ-αίων</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <sense id="n27904.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">long-lived, immortal,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θεοί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:21:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.12</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:23:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
